name: Crypto Token Research
description: Deep-dive research on any cryptocurrency token. Analyzes tokenomics, comparable projects, risk factors, and on-chain data to produce a structured investment research report.

tokenIdentifier.description: Token address, ticker symbol, or project name (e.g., '0x1234...', 'UNI', 'Uniswap')

chain.description: Blockchain to focus on. Use 'any' to search across chains.

depth.description: Research depth: quick (key metrics only), standard (full report), deep (exhaustive with on-chain analysis)

fields.name: riskScore
fields.description: Overall risk score (1 = lowest risk, 10 = highest risk)

fields.name: tokenomics
fields.description: Tokenomics breakdown: { totalSupply, circulatingSupply, distribution, vestingSchedule, inflationRate }

fields.name: comparables
fields.description: Array of 3+ comparable projects with relative positioning

fields.name: risks
fields.description: Array of identified risks across contract, centralization, liquidity, and regulatory dimensions

invariants.invariant: PHASE 1: RESEARCH. Before producing any output, create an artifact 'token-research-notes.md' documenting your raw findings: sources checked, data points collected, and reasoning chain. This artifact must exist before the final report.
invariants.measurement: Verify 'token-research-notes.md' artifact exists and contains at least 3 distinct sources before output is generated.

do: Search for the token across CoinGecko, DeFiLlama, official docs, and blockchain explorers
Document each source and what data you extracted from it
dont: Skip research and generate a report from general knowledge alone
Produce the final output without creating the research artifact first

invariants.invariant: The tokenomics object MUST cover all 5 dimensions: totalSupply, circulatingSupply, distribution (top holder breakdown), vestingSchedule (unlock timeline), and inflationRate (annual emission). If data is unavailable for a dimension, explicitly state 'Data not available' with reasoning.
invariants.measurement: Check that result.tokenomics contains all 5 keys. Each must be non-empty or explicitly marked unavailable.

do: totalSupply: '1,000,000,000 UNI', circulatingSupply: '753,766,667 UNI (75.4%)', distribution: { team: '21.3%', investors: '18%', community: '60.7%' }, vestingSchedule: 'Team tokens fully vested as of Sept 2024', inflationRate: '2% perpetual after 4-year cliff'
dont: Omit vestingSchedule because it was hard to find

invariants.invariant: Identify at least 3 comparable projects in the same category. For each comparable, provide: name, marketCap, keyDifferentiator, and relativePositioning (how the target token compares).
invariants.measurement: Count items in result.comparables array. Must be >= 3. Each must have all 4 required fields.

do: For UNI: compare against SushiSwap (SUSHI), PancakeSwap (CAKE), Curve (CRV) with market cap ratios and feature differences
dont: Name comparables without explaining how they relate to the target token

invariants.invariant: Assess risk across exactly 4 dimensions: (1) Contract Risk — audit status, known vulnerabilities, upgrade mechanisms; (2) Centralization Risk — admin keys, governance concentration, single points of failure; (3) Liquidity Risk — DEX/CEX depth, concentration of liquidity, withdrawal patterns; (4) Regulatory Risk — jurisdiction exposure, securities classification risk, compliance status.
invariants.measurement: Verify result.risks contains entries tagged with each of the 4 dimensions. No dimension may be omitted.

do: Contract Risk: 'Audited by Trail of Bits (2023). No critical findings. Proxy upgradeable — governance-controlled.'
Liquidity Risk: 'Primary liquidity on Uniswap V3 ($150M TVL). Top 3 LPs hold 40% of liquidity.'
dont: Skip regulatory risk because it's speculative

invariants.invariant: Calculate riskScore (1-10) using deterministic formula: Start at 5. Adjust: unaudited contract (+2), no governance (+1), <$1M liquidity (+2), regulatory concerns (+1), team fully doxxed (-1), multiple audits (-1), >$100M liquidity (-1). Clamp to [1, 10].
invariants.measurement: Verify riskScore matches the formula applied to findings. Show the calculation in the research artifact.

do: Base 5 + unaudited(+2) + low liquidity(+2) - doxxed team(-1) = 8
dont: Assign risk score based on gut feeling

invariants.invariant: Output MUST be valid JSON matching the schema: { result: { summary: string, riskScore: number, tokenomics: object, comparables: array, risks: array } }. The summary must be 2-3 paragraphs covering the key thesis, main risks, and positioning vs comparables.
invariants.measurement: Validate JSON structure against outputSpec. Summary must contain at least 2 paragraph breaks.

do: Return structured JSON with all required fields populated from research
dont: Return plain text or markdown instead of JSON
